r1:
The current monthly allowance for all corps members is N77,000, which was approved by the Federal Government in September 2024.

1. This allowance is paid to all corps members regardless of their state of deployment.
2. The increase in the allowance is a result of the National Minimum Wage (Amendment) Act 2024, which raised Nigeria's minimum wage to N70,000.

Official Source: NYSC Website – https://www.nysc.gov.ng  | Portal – https://portal.nysc.gov.ng

You may also want to ask:
1. How often is the NYSC allowance paid to corps members?
2. Are there any additional allowances or stipends that corps members may receive?
r2:
To get your call-up letter, follow these steps:

1. Check your email: Your call-up letter is usually sent to your registered email address.
2. Visit the NYSC portal: You can also log in to the NYSC portal with your details to access your call-up letter.
3. Contact your state secretariat: If you're unable to access your call-up letter online, you can visit your state secretariat for assistance.

Official Source: NYSC Website – https://www.nysc.gov.ng  | Portal – https://portal.nysc.gov.ng

You may also want to ask:
1. What are the required documents for NYSC registration?
2. How do I check my NYSC deployment status?
